# AgentReadiness

> Score any website for AI agent readiness in seconds. Get a free /llms.txt.

## About
- URL: https://agent-sites-five.vercel.app
- Category: Developer tool
- Free to use

## What we do
AgentReadiness scans any public URL and scores it across 8 signals that determine
how well AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) can read and understand a website:

- /llms.txt file — the emerging standard for AI context
- robots.txt AI agent rules (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, etc.)
- sitemap.xml — helps agents discover all pages
- JSON-LD structured data — machine-readable page metadata
- OpenGraph tags — title, description, image for agents and social
- Title + meta description — basic but critical
- Canonical URL — prevents duplicate content confusion
- Clean readable content — extracted via Jina Reader

## Key pages
- https://agent-sites-five.vercel.app/ — main scanner
- https://agent-sites-five.vercel.app/reports — public scan log (last 24 hours)
- https://agent-sites-five.vercel.app/pricing — upcoming paid plans
- https://agent-sites-five.vercel.app/api-docs — upcoming REST API

## Sitemap
- https://agent-sites-five.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Notes
- All scans are public and cached for 24 hours per domain
- Rate limit: 15 scans per IP per 24 hours
- Built with FastAPI (Render) + Next.js (Vercel) + Supabase
